title: Generic researcher leaf-worker output (target + comps + precedents)
description: Adapted from anthropics/financial-services @ 1c2ece3467c3434ddd01e655970e35b773940a29 — managed-agent-cookbooks/pitch-agent/subagents/researcher.yaml. Apache 2.0 (preserved). Adapted 2026-05-09 for Mahoraga: this is the most polished leaf-worker schema in the source repo. We keep the (target, comps[], precedents[]) shape as a generic template for any Researcher role-as-tool that has to return ranked tabular findings with an optional reference set. CapIQ/Daloopa MCP wiring stripped; data sources are caller-injected.
